title: Looking for Teacher at Coursera India International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Looking for Teacher at Coursera India International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Teacher looking for your next big career move? Coursera India International Enterprises in Ghaziabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Coursera India International Enterprises:
Coursera India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Coursera India International Enterprises!
